title: rumohra lurida
intro: Rumohra lurida, also known as the Goldie fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It is a type of fern that is native to the tropical regions of Asia and is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties. The plant contains various compounds that have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems. Rumohra lurida can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system.
